{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans 'Strategy Testing' %}

{% trans 'Before enabling automation, thoroughly test your strategy to ensure it performs as expected. We recommend:' %}

  • {% trans 'Back-testing with historical data.' %}
  • {% trans 'Paper trading to validate performance.' %}
  • {% trans 'Starting with small position sizes when going live.' %}
  • {% trans 'Monitoring initial trades closely.' %}

{% trans 'Automation Setup Process' %}

{% trans 'Follow these steps to properly set up your automation:' %}

  1. {% trans 'Link Your Broker' %}

    {% trans 'Connect your broker in the Automate page to receive your webhook URL.' %} {% trans 'See how' %}

  2. {% trans 'Prepare Alert Messages' %}

    {% trans 'Configure your alert messages in the Strategy/indicator alerts section.' %} {% trans 'Learn more' %}

  3. {% trans 'Set Up TradingView Alerts' %}

    {% trans 'Create alerts in TradingView to start receiving trade signals.' %} {% trans 'View guide' %}

{% trans 'Webhook Flexibility' %}

{% trans 'A single webhook URL from our platform is versatile and can handle:' %}

  • {% trans 'Multiple assets.' %}
  • {% trans 'Different timeframes.' %}
  • {% trans 'Various strategy settings.' %}
  • {% trans 'Multiple TradingView alerts.' %}

{% trans 'Simply use the same webhook URL across different TradingView alerts for seamless integration.' %}

{% trans 'Crypto Trading Requirements' %}

{% trans 'Spot Trading' %}

{% trans 'For spot trading, you need to have sufficient balance in both:' %}

  • {% trans 'Base currency (the asset you want to trade, e.g., BTC)' %}
  • {% trans 'Quote currency (the currency used for pricing, e.g., USDT)' %}

{% trans 'Example: For BTC/USDT trading, you need BTC for selling and USDT for buying' %}

{% trans 'Futures Trading' %}

{% trans 'For futures trading, you only need balance in:' %}

  • {% trans 'Quote currency (e.g., USDT) for margin and position maintenance' %}

{% trans 'Example: For BTC/USDT Perpetual futures, you only need USDT balance' %}

{% trans 'Security Warnings' %}

  • {% trans 'Never share your webhook URL with anyone - it provides direct access to your trading automation.' %}
  • {% trans 'Keep your API keys and credentials private - sharing them compromises your account security.' %}

{% trans 'Need help?' %}

{% trans 'If you encounter any issues or you have a question, our support team is here to help. Contact us' %} {% trans 'here' %}.
